info.title: AOR detached control-plane API
info.description: Machine-readable contract for the implemented self-hosted alpha HTTP/SSE control-plane routes. This spec describes the current hybrid module plus detached transport baseline; it does not claim hosted SaaS, full CLI-over-HTTP parity, or target-stack APIs.

200.description: Replay-safe server-sent event stream using live-run-event payloads.

bearerAuth.description: Required in production-hardened mode. local-trusted loopback mode may run without bearer credentials.

readModelLimit.name: limit
readModelLimit.description: Optional local-alpha read-model window. Detached read routes default to a bounded 200-entry window and cap explicit requests at 1000 entries.

eventHistoryLimit.name: limit
eventHistoryLimit.description: Optional bounded history window. Defaults to the route-specific replay window.

RunControlAction.description: Run-control mutation request for bounded start/pause/resume/steer/cancel actions.

UiLifecycleAction.description: UI lifecycle attach/detach request. The web surface remains optional and detachable.

LifecycleCommandAction.description: Bounded lifecycle command request for the documented guided command subset.

InteractionAnswer.description: Operator answer request for a pending runner interaction.

JsonObject.description: Route-specific JSON response backed by the documented AOR contract families.

AuthError.description: Authentication or authorization denial. Transport-level denials do not invoke mutation handlers.

ProjectState.description: Resolved project state and runtime-root layout.

FlowList.description: Read-only runtime flow projection list built from mission, next-action, and closure evidence.

FlowDetail.description: Read-only runtime flow projection or null when no selected flow exists.

Runs.description: Read-only run summary list built from filesystem runtime artifacts.

RunControlAction.description: Run-control mutation result with durable state and audit refs.

RunControlActionError.description: Blocked run-control mutation with persisted audit evidence.

LifecycleCommandAction.description: Lifecycle command mutation result with CLI output parity.

LifecycleCommandActionError.description: Blocked lifecycle command mutation with command output when available.

InteractionAnswerError.description: Accepted but non-resumable interaction answer result.

RuntimeLayout.description: Filesystem runtime layout owned by .aor; property names mirror the runtime state artifact.
